description: An interior scene showing a Roman pottery workshop. Several figures in classical Roman dress examine ceramic wares displayed on shelves within an arched alcove. A bearded man in a dark toga stands at center, apparently explaining or showing pottery to visiting dignitaries. A woman in a blue-gray dress holds roses. In the foreground, elaborate mosaic floors with Latin inscriptions and bird motifs are visible. Ceramic vessels and pottery line the shelves. The scene is richly detailed with warm, muted tones.

_meta.title: Hadrian Visiting a Romano British Pottery
